message:
🐛 Fix transparent backgrounds on AI insight cards and modals (#1603)

* 🐛 Guard chart components against division by zero (NaN in SVG paths)

When max/maxValue is 0, division produces NaN which propagates into
SVG path d attributes causing "Expected number" errors. Guard all
percentage calculations with max > 0 check across Gauge, ProgressBar,
CircularProgress, SegmentedProgressBar, HorseshoeGauge, PremiumGauge,
and KVCacheMonitor components.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix transparent backgrounds on AI insight cards and modals

AI insight cards used 10% opacity backgrounds (bg-{color}-500/10) that
allowed dashboard content to bleed through. Changed to solid bg-{color}-950
colors. Also made glass/modal backgrounds fully opaque (was 92-95% opacity)
across dark, light, and high-contrast themes.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix ScanProgressOverlay semi-transparent background

Changed bg-background/90 to solid bg-background and removed
backdrop-blur-sm to prevent content bleed-through.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
